query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clientes) as total_clientes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos) as total_processos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conhecimentos) as total_conhecimentos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM peticoes_geradas) as total_peticoes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prazos_processuais) as total_prazos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jobs) as total_jobs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notificacoes) as total_notificacoes;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clientes) as total_clientes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos) as total_processos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conhecimentos) as total_conhecimentos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM peticoes_geradas) as total_peticoes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prazos_processuais) as total_prazos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jobs) as total_jobs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notificacoes) as total_notificacoes;
